name: val-openai-local-bridge
description: A local OpenAI-compatible API bridge for an authenticated RMIT Val browser session.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @val-bridge/protocol && npm run build -w @val-bridge/server && npm run build -w @val-bridge/extension
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.release:extension: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build -w @val-bridge/protocol && npm run build -w @val-bridge/server && npm run build:release -w @val-bridge/extension && node packages/extension/scripts/package.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @val-bridge/protocol && npm run typecheck -w @val-bridge/server && npm run typecheck -w @val-bridge/extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @val-bridge/server && npm run test -w @val-bridge/extension
